channel.title: Posts on Hicham Assoudi
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Hicham Assoudi

item.title: Using a HuggingFace Dataset to Jump-Start Oracle 26ai Vector Search Experiments
item.description: How I stopped building throwaway test data from scratch and used a HuggingFace dataset to get a fully vectorized Oracle 26ai table — with CLIP image embeddings — in a single session.

item.title: Building a Local Oracle Database 26ai Free Lab with Docker on Windows
item.description: A practical local setup for validating Oracle AI code, testing vector-search workflows, and building a repeatable Oracle Database 26ai Free experimentation environment on Windows with Docker.

item.title: Welcome to assoudi.blog
item.description: Why I launched assoudi.blog and what I will publish here.
